sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28772" key="dusbra/kanos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-βράκᾰνος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ρᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n28772.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to deal with</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:404" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">404</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βρακεῖν</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
